task_completion.description: Verify that the products and sales data have been loaded into Power BI.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the Data/Fields pane on the right side of the Power BI interface. You should see 'products' and 'sales' listed as tables.

task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the 'Total_Revenue' DAX measure.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'Total_Revenue' with a calculator icon next to it in the Data/Fields pane, or look at the DAX formula bar showing 'Total_Revenue = ...'.

task_completion.description: Verify that Image_URL and Product_Page_URL are categorized correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a globe/web icon next to 'Product_Page_URL' and an image/picture icon next to 'Image_URL' in the Data pane, OR verify that the Matrix visual renders actual images (not text URLs) and clickable link icons.

task_completion.description: Verify that a Matrix visual is created displaying Product_Name, the product Image, and the Product Page URL as an icon.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the report canvas for a Matrix visual. It must contain product names, actual rendered images (not text links), and a URL icon (typically a chain link) for the product page.

task_completion.description: Verify that a Sparkline showing the Total_Revenue trend over Date is included in the Matrix.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look inside the Matrix visual for a column containing small line charts (sparklines) next to the revenue numbers or product details.

task_completion.description: Verify that the report is saved as 'Product_Catalog.pbix'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the title bar at the top of the Power BI Desktop window; it should read 'Product_Catalog - Power BI Desktop'. Alternatively, look for the 'Product_Catalog.pbix' file on the Desktop.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Power BI Desktop application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the standard Power BI Desktop user interface (ribbon, canvas, panes), not a terminal or text editor writing a script to generate the file.

integrity.description: Verify the visuals are genuinely rendered by Power BI.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Matrix, images, and sparklines should be integrated into the Power BI canvas with standard Power BI selection borders and formatting, not pasted image overlays.

integrity.description: Verify the measure was created using DAX rather than renaming a static column.
integrity.visual_evidence: If the formula bar is visible, it should show a DAX calculation (e.g., SUMX or SUM) for Total_Revenue, and the field should have a calculator icon.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected filename: Product_Catalog.pbix. Required measure: 'Total_Revenue' calculated as SUM(Quantity * Unit_Price) or equivalent SUMX. Required data categories: 'Image_URL' must be categorized as ImageUrl (renders as an image in visuals), and 'Product_Page_URL' must be categorized as WebUrl (renders as a clickable link/icon). The visual must be a Matrix, and it must contain a Sparkline (a native Power BI feature added to a field in a visual).
